column1: yo Marin whats up its Spiffy with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours
checkin in on y'all, lookin forward to havin you out here in Punta
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets? you have the booze cruise event all locked in
How far in advance do we need to book them? Can we do it once we get there?
Typically get up to 2 days before your trip to add online
You can do it on site but I have no clue what pricing will be or what availability will look lile
I think we're probably good on the party pass
I was wondering if you know any information about the restaurants you need to make a reservation for do you know if they are included and how to make reservations
yea you make those after check in. theres a concierge desk you go to, reservations are first come first serve and youre able to make 3 at a time I wanna say
the specialty restaurants are pretty good
safe travels today. see y'all soon
Hey we've landed in punta cana but are having a hard time finding the driver
Okay word, just reached out to them as well
checkin in, everything good? hows it goin
